content:
ITEM 4. Mine Safety Disclosures
Not applicable.
Executive Officers of the Company
The executive officers of the Company are elected [DATE_TIME] at the organizational meeting of the Board of Directors, which follows the [DATE_TIME] meeting of the shareholders, and at other Board of Directors meetings, as appropriate. Each of the
executive officers has been employed by the Company in the position or positions indicated in the list and pertinent notes below. Each of the executive officers has been employed by the Company for [DATE_TIME].
At [DATE_TIME], the executive officers of the Company were as follows:
(1)Mr. Iger was appointed Executive Chairman effective [DATE_TIME], he is also Chairman of the Board from [DATE_TIME]. He was Chief Executive Officer from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME].
(2)Mr. [PERSON] was appointed Chief Executive Officer effective [DATE_TIME]. He served as Chairman of Disney Parks, Experiences and Products since the segment’s creation in [DATE_TIME], and prior to that was Chairman of Walt Disney Parks and Resorts since [DATE_TIME].
(3)Ms. [PERSON] was appointed Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer effective [DATE_TIME]. She was previously Executive Vice President, Corporate Real Estate, Alliances and Treasurer of the Company from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME].
(4)Ms. [PERSON] was appointed Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer effective [DATE_TIME]. She was previously Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer from [DATE_TIME].
(5)Ms. [PERSON] was appointed Senior Executive Vice President Corporate Communications effective [DATE_TIME]. She was previously Executive Vice President Corporate Communications from [DATE_TIME].
PART II
ITEM 5.
